name: electron-node-upgrade
tagline: Guides Electron's Node.js version upgrade across patch fixes, builds, and test runs in three tracked phases.
verdict: Strong, concrete, deterministic multi-phase workflow with explicit success criteria and thorough failure handling for patch conflicts, build errors, and test failures. Weak spots: no version/changelog signal, and the custom `e` build tool is used throughout without an explicit requirements or availability check.

highlights.summary: Phase Three's BoringSSL/V8 failure-pattern knowledge base (~65 lines) is separable reference material kept inline instead of split to references/.
The niche `e` build tool and `yarn husky` are used throughout with no explicit requirements section or availability check.
No version field or changelog section anywhere in the skill (line 1 frontmatter).
